title: Immortal Enchantment
description: Master the power of totems, blend totems with the enchantment of objects, and give them an immortal effect.
body:
Master the power of totems, blend totems with the enchantment of objects, and give them an immortal effect.
Added an Immortal Enchanting Platform that allows for the fusion of undead totems into items.
There are configuration files available.
The default maximum enchantment level is 3, and armor can be enchanted by default.
